name: Cheesy Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Corn Meal; White or Yellow
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, corn meal, mustard, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until just moistened.
3. In another bowl, beat together the egg, milk, and oil.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake at 425 degrees F (220 degrees C) for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Cool slightly in the pan, then remove to a wire rack.
9. Cut into squares and serve warm.
